mapper.select: select scf.id, scf.celebrity_id, scf.country, scf.like_tags, scf.gender, scf.is_existence, scf.is_num_wrong, scf.is_dispose, scf.dispose_user_id, scf.dispose_user_name, scf.create_user_type, scf.remark, scf.create_by, scf.create_time, scf.update_by, scf.update_time, su.username from store_celebrity_feedback scf LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id =scf.create_by WHERE celebrity_id = #{celebrityId}
